name: Filesystem
description: Give Claude scoped read/write access to specific directories outside the project root — useful for cross-repo work, shared asset folders, or a downloads dir.

name: Git
description: Structured git operations (status, log, diff, blame, branch) as first-class tools instead of shell parsing. Handy for history-heavy tasks and safer diffs.

name: Fetch
description: Fetch a URL and convert it to clean markdown for the model. Lightweight web reading without a full browser.

name: Sequential Thinking
description: A scratchpad tool that lets the model plan and revise multi-step reasoning explicitly. Helps on complex, branching problems.

name: Memory (knowledge graph)
description: A persistent knowledge-graph memory the model can write to and query across sessions. Good for long-running projects that accumulate facts.

name: Context7 (up-to-date docs)
description: Pulls version-accurate, up-to-date documentation and code examples for thousands of libraries straight into context — kills 'hallucinated API' bugs. Add 'use context7' to a prompt.

name: Playwright (browser automation)
description: Drive a real browser — navigate, click, fill, assert, screenshot — via structured accessibility snapshots (no pixel guessing). The standard for testing and verifying web UIs.

name: Chrome DevTools
description: Inspect live pages through Chrome DevTools — performance traces, network requests, console, and DOM. Great for debugging real front-end behavior and Core Web Vitals.

name: GitHub
description: Read and act on GitHub — issues, PRs, code search, Actions, reviews — from inside the session. Uses GitHub's official hosted MCP server (OAuth on first use).

name: Sentry
description: Pull real error reports, stack traces, and issue context from Sentry so Claude can debug against production reality. Hosted MCP with OAuth.

name: Postgres (read-only)
description: Let Claude inspect a Postgres schema and run read-only queries so it writes migrations and queries against your real tables. Point it at a connection string.

name: Figma (Dev Mode)
description: Turn Figma designs into accurate code — pull layout, tokens, and component structure from a frame instead of eyeballing a screenshot. Needs a Figma access token.

name: Supabase
description: Let Claude inspect your Supabase project — schema, tables, and (read-only) queries — so it writes migrations and SQL against your real database. Runs read-only by default.

name: MongoDB
description: Explore a MongoDB database and run queries/aggregations from the session, so Claude works against your real collections instead of guessing the shape.

name: Stripe
description: Official Stripe MCP — create and inspect customers, products, prices, and payment links, and search Stripe's docs, straight from the session. Use a restricted/test key.

name: Notion
description: Read and write Notion pages and databases — pull specs, docs, and tasks into context, or push generated notes back. Official Notion MCP.

name: Brave Search
description: Web and local search via the Brave Search API — give Claude fresh results without a full browser. Good default when you just need to look something up.

name: Firecrawl (web scrape/crawl)
description: Scrape, crawl, and extract structured data from websites — turn docs sites, changelogs, or competitors into clean context. Great for research and data collection.
